# SSH 删除远程文件/目录
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 删除文件
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "remove", "remote_path": "/opt/app/old.log"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a202272656d6f7665222c202272656d6f74655f70617468223a20222f6f70742f6170702f6f6c642e6c6f67227d

# 递归删除目录
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "remove", "remote_path": "/opt/app/old"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a202272656d6f7665222c202272656d6f74655f70617468223a20222f6f70742f6170702f6f6c64227d

# 删除不存在的路径不会报错
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "remove", "remote_path": "/opt/app/nonexistent"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a202272656d6f7665222c202272656d6f74655f70617468223a20222f6f70742f6170702f6e6f6e6578697374656e74227d
